name: Following Pointer
description: A decorative cursor follower that creates a custom pointer element (avatar, emoji, or any content) that follows the mouse within a container.
whenToUse: Use for interactive sections, blog cards, or creative layouts where you want a custom cursor/pointer that follows mouse movement.

props.name: children
props.description: Content that the pointer follows within

props.name: title
props.description: Content to display in the follower element

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the container
